compounddef.compoundname: InterpolationBuilderTraits< ddc::SplineBuilder< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, BSplines, InterpolationDDim, BcLower, BcUpper, Solver > >

memberdef.type: ddc::SplineBuilder< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, BSplines, InterpolationDDim, BcLower, BcUpper, Solver >
memberdef.definition: using InterpolationBuilderTraits< ddc::SplineBuilder< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, BSplines, InterpolationDDim, BcLower, BcUpper, Solver > >::Builder = ddc::SplineBuilder< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, BSplines, InterpolationDDim, BcLower, BcUpper, Solver>
memberdef.name: Builder
memberdef.qualifiedname: InterpolationBuilderTraits< ddc::SplineBuilder< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, BSplines, InterpolationDDim, BcLower, BcUpper, Solver > >::Builder

memberdef.definition: using InterpolationBuilderTraits< ddc::SplineBuilder< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, BSplines, InterpolationDDim, BcLower, BcUpper, Solver > >::data_type = double
memberdef.name: data_type
memberdef.qualifiedname: InterpolationBuilderTraits< ddc::SplineBuilder< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, BSplines, InterpolationDDim, BcLower, BcUpper, Solver > >::data_type

briefdescription.para: The data type that the data is saved on.

memberdef.definition: using InterpolationBuilderTraits< ddc::SplineBuilder< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, BSplines, InterpolationDDim, BcLower, BcUpper, Solver > >::interpolation_grid_type = typename Builder::interpolation_discrete_dimension_type
memberdef.name: interpolation_grid_type
memberdef.qualifiedname: InterpolationBuilderTraits< ddc::SplineBuilder< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, BSplines, InterpolationDDim, BcLower, BcUpper, Solver > >::interpolation_grid_type

briefdescription.para: The discrete grid on which interpolation values are given.

memberdef.definition: using InterpolationBuilderTraits< ddc::SplineBuilder< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, BSplines, InterpolationDDim, BcLower, BcUpper, Solver > >::interpolation_idx_range_type = typename Builder::interpolation_domain_type
memberdef.name: interpolation_idx_range_type
memberdef.qualifiedname: InterpolationBuilderTraits< ddc::SplineBuilder< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, BSplines, InterpolationDDim, BcLower, BcUpper, Solver > >::interpolation_idx_range_type

briefdescription.para: The 1D index range for the interpolation mesh.

memberdef.definition: using InterpolationBuilderTraits< ddc::SplineBuilder< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, BSplines, InterpolationDDim, BcLower, BcUpper, Solver > >::coeff_idx_range_type = IdxRange<typename Builder::bsplines_type>
memberdef.name: coeff_idx_range_type
memberdef.qualifiedname: InterpolationBuilderTraits< ddc::SplineBuilder< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, BSplines, InterpolationDDim, BcLower, BcUpper, Solver > >::coeff_idx_range_type

briefdescription.para: The index range for the interpolation coefficients.

memberdef.definition: using InterpolationBuilderTraits< ddc::SplineBuilder< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, BSplines, InterpolationDDim, BcLower, BcUpper, Solver > >::basis_domain_type = typename Builder::bsplines_type
memberdef.name: basis_domain_type
memberdef.qualifiedname: InterpolationBuilderTraits< ddc::SplineBuilder< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, BSplines, InterpolationDDim, BcLower, BcUpper, Solver > >::basis_domain_type

briefdescription.para: The discrete dimension for the B-spline coefficients.

memberdef.definition: using InterpolationBuilderTraits< ddc::SplineBuilder< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, BSplines, InterpolationDDim, BcLower, BcUpper, Solver > >::batched_basis_idx_range_type = typename Builder::template batched_spline_domain_type<IdxRangeBatchedInterpolation>
memberdef.name: batched_basis_idx_range_type
memberdef.qualifiedname: InterpolationBuilderTraits< ddc::SplineBuilder< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, BSplines, InterpolationDDim, BcLower, BcUpper, Solver > >::batched_basis_idx_range_type

briefdescription.para: Batched domain with InterpolationDDim replaced by BSplines.

memberdef.definition: using InterpolationBuilderTraits< ddc::SplineBuilder< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, BSplines, InterpolationDDim, BcLower, BcUpper, Solver > >::batched_derivs_idx_range_type = typename Builder::template batched_derivs_domain_type<IdxRangeBatchedInterpolation>
memberdef.name: batched_derivs_idx_range_type
memberdef.qualifiedname: InterpolationBuilderTraits< ddc::SplineBuilder< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, BSplines, InterpolationDDim, BcLower, BcUpper, Solver > >::batched_derivs_idx_range_type

briefdescription.para: Batched domain with InterpolationDDim replaced by deriv_type.

memberdef.definition: static constexpr std::size_t InterpolationBuilderTraits< ddc::SplineBuilder< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, BSplines, InterpolationDDim, BcLower, BcUpper, Solver > >::rank
memberdef.name: rank
memberdef.qualifiedname: InterpolationBuilderTraits< ddc::SplineBuilder< ExecSpace, MemorySpace, BSplines, InterpolationDDim, BcLower, BcUpper, Solver > >::rank

briefdescription.para: The number of interpolation dimensions (always 1 for SplineBuilder).

detaileddescription.para: ddc::SplineBuilder uses different alias names from the InterpolationBuilder convention. This specialisation provides the mapping so that ddc::SplineBuilder can be used directly as an InterpolationBuilder without wrapping it in SplineBuilder1D.

Mapping: interpolation_discrete_dimension_type -> interpolation_grid_type interpolation_domain_type -> interpolation_idx_range_type bsplines_type -> basis_domain_type batched_spline_domain_type<D> -> batched_basis_idx_range_type<D> batched_derivs_domain_type<D> -> batched_derivs_idx_range_type<D>
